Saturday preview: Slipper shake-ups and rider changes shape Super Saturday

The widespread weight allotments for the G1 Newmarket Handicap on Saturday have understandably been a hot topic of conversation all week, particularly the 57kg given to boom colt Tentyris. Everyone believes it's a swing in their direction, but co-trainer Sam Freedman has full faith in his stable star.
Entries will close soon for the 2026 Inglis Chairman's Sale, where the theme 'Where Elegance Meets Excellence' will play out again at the Riverside Stables complex at Warwick Farm.

The same syndicate that purchased G1 Spring Champion Stakes winner and Windsor Park Stud resident Profondo have combined again to purchase New Zealand Champion 3YO Savaglee ahead of a burgeoning stud career.

The G1 Randwick Guineas, the last of Australia's great Group 1 mile Guineas races for the season, takes place on Saturday. The race has been one of significance for Arrowfield Stud's John Messara over the years, and the 2026 edition shapes to become another memorable event for the breeding titan.

For a stable that has long set the benchmark in New Zealand racing, days like Champions Day, on which The NZB Kiwi is staged, represent far more than another opportunity to saddle winners, it's a time to shine.

Randwick hosted a trial session in humid conditions on Thursday, where proven performers and promising juveniles stepped out. Group 1 winner Globe was the standout as he builds toward an autumn campaign, while several 2-year-olds also impressed.

Welcome to this edition of the Science Corner, brought to you by AgriFutures Australia, where we delve into recent findings in equine research that have significant implications for the thoroughbred industry.
